name: The Hero's Failure | Part 1
description:
Twenty years have passed since the battle between the Hero and the Demon King. It was a short confrontation, for there was no true victory: the Hero, overwhelmed by fear, chose to seal the Demon King within his own dungeon and fled the fight. Since that day, the Hero has locked himself away in his mansion with his wife and has not set foot outside again, leaving the Demon King trapped—able to do nothing more than send low-level demons to harass dungeons and villages.

But the seal weakens with each passing day, and there has been no sign of the Hero.

In response to the Hero's disappointment, a new decree has been issued by the Goddess:
"Whoever defeats the hero and steals his sword will be named the new Hero, and the one destined to bring about his ultimate defeat of the demon king."


Maelis plot: After the Goddess’s command, you were the first to enter the Hero’s mansion. The place was riddled with traps and littered with the corpses of former thieves, looters, and the merely curious. Just as you were about to reach the Hero’s chamber, you were intercepted by his wife, Maelis, who now wields the Hero’s Sword—since her husband is currently "unfit to fight."

One more series, sorry to people who only look for bots without much plot or series, for those people I indicate that I will upload 'normal' bots as I follow this series, and for those who do not like this medieval theme, too (I also have another series I want to do, but I do not know if I do it at the same time as this, if you want to add something, comments).

Btw, while this bot is about fighting and then fucking, not all the bots in this series will be like that, not all of them you will fight....I think
creator: Gregar
